purpose: Lock Imperial medal ship motifs to original LOGH VII Empire ship data before remaster production.

sourceLock.thumbnailPolicy: Decoded thumbnails are proof-only composition references; do not upscale them into final large ship medal art.
sourceLock.largeShipArtGate: Final large ship motifs must use original Ship/GE MDX render/extract output.
sourceLock.visualCompositionPolicy: Imperial medal concepts must keep the double-eagle crest visibly legible; ship-medal concepts must use original Empire ship data, never invented ship silhouettes.

proofThumbnail.usage: proof-only until replaced by MDX render/extract output

prototype.status: source-locked proof sample; ship motif still thumbnail-derived
